test_quality: The EditMode tests are clear, focused, and cover the main EPIC-02 behaviors well: RNG determinism, world-state JSON loading and round-trip, fixed-timestep advancement, transition logging, reproducibility, and negative-control seed divergence. The full Unity EditMode suite passed (24/24), which is strong evidence that the implementation works as intended. However, quantitative coverage could not be produced in this environment, so the '>80%' coverage requirement cannot be verified. There are also a few untested guard-paths and utility behaviors.
missing_coverage: No machine-generated line or branch coverage report was produced, so coverage adequacy cannot be proven against the >80% threshold.
WorldStateJsonStore file-system paths are not fully covered: missing-file and save-to-file behaviors are untested.
Several guard-clause error paths are untested, including null arguments in SimulationEngine entry points and invalid range handling in DeterministicRandom.NextInt.
SimulationEngine behavior for zero ticks and null or empty system lists is only partially exercised.
CommandLineEditModeTestRunner failure-path behavior is not directly tested.
